violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior and clean dish shelving noted not properly maintained.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hoods and filters noted not clean (very greasy).

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen around garbage cans mop sink area and around CO2 tanks noted in need of cleaning. Floors in the walk-in freezer noted with a large amount of dark build up that should be scraped from the floor. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen under the baked beans warming unit noted in need of repair. Also the steel wall covering in the women's restroom noted in need of repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelving by dishwasher outside of the electric roaster and the interiors of some reach-in coolers noted not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Tall stainless steel reach-in cooler noted with a broken door interior in need of repair.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Formica prep counter in back used for food prep reach-in cooler racks (vinyl coating cracked and rusting) and fan in walk-in freezer noted in need of repairs.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reach-in freezer interiors reach-in cooler interiors and outsides of bean roasters noted not clean
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hoods and filters noted not clean.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the walk-in freezer noted in need of cleaning Walls around chicken breading area near fryers noted in need of cleaning. Holes in the ware-washing area noted in need of caulking.
